description_long: This is a medieval-style vertical banner mounted on a sturdy, dark metal pole with decorative finials at the top and ends of the horizontal crossbar. The banner itself is a deep red fabric, weathered and slightly tattered at the bottom, with a golden emblem or crest visible on one side. The pole features metallic rings and fittings, adding to its ornamental and robust appearance. The base is circular and weighted, likely to provide stability when placed outdoors. The fabric hangs loosely from the crossbar, showing natural folds and wear, suggesting exposure to the elements. The overall design evokes a sense of historical or ceremonial significance, suitable for marking territory or denoting affiliation in an urban or public setting.
description: A medieval-style red fabric banner with a golden emblem, mounted on a decorative dark metal pole with a weighted base and ornamental finials. The banner appears weathered and ceremonial, suitable for outdoor urban display.
description_view_0: A side view showing the slender, dark metal pole and the circular base, with the banner fabric edge barely visible.
description_view_1: A frontal view displaying the full red banner fabric, slightly tattered at the bottom, with the crossbar and decorative finials clearly visible.
description_view_2: The opposite side view, similar to view 0, showing the pole and base with minimal visibility of the banner fabric.
description_view_3: The reverse frontal view, revealing the golden emblem or crest on the red banner fabric, with the crossbar and finials in clear view.
